calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963. Telephone # 707 246 3323. (514)
Petitioners Zhuo bin Wu and Yun Xia Zhou; father and mother of minor.
Petitioner Yun Xia Zhou sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Hanna Wong.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Jintao Wu to Paco Jintao Wu.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
